steps.title: Identify what “good” modifies
steps.content: In “of a good height, as could be seen even from the seated figure,” the word “good” modifies height. His stature is so notable that it's visible even while seated.

steps.title: Match the correct meaning
steps.content: “Considerable” means notable or significant in quantity. Reliable, well-behaved, and talented address character, conduct, and ability—none measure physical extent. That matches choice D — D is correct.
